title: Buddha's Polish Sausage Stir Fry
description: A savory, spicy stir fry with polish sausage, bell peppers, and onions, inspired by Eastern flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high.
Add the polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cabbage and carrots and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the bell peppers and cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and garlic.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and sausage, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions and a sprinkle of soy sauce.
